metadata.title: Minecraft Block Trivia Corpus
metadata.description: Comprehensive collection of 25 Minecraft blocks with properties, images, and trivia hooks for building a trivia game
metadata.edition: Java Edition (Bedrock Edition IDs provided where available)
metadata.note: Pilot sample of representative blocks across all categories. Can be expanded to all ~300 blocks using the same data structure and methodology.

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What is the minimum tool tier required to mine Diamond Ore and actually obtain the diamond?
trivia_hooks.answer: Iron Pickaxe (or better: Diamond or Netherite)

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: Which pickaxe material mines Diamond Ore the fastest?
At what Y-level does Diamond Ore most commonly generate?
True or False: You can infinitely obtain diamonds through renewable methods in vanilla survival?
With Fortune III, what is the maximum number of diamonds you can get from mining a single Diamond Ore block?
What is the minimum tool required to mine Iron Ore?
Where does Iron Ore most commonly spawn in the Overworld?
trivia_hooks.answer: Around Y: 232 (with additional peaks at Y: 16)

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: Is Iron Ore a renewable resource?
What do you get when you smelt Iron Ore?
What tool do you need to mine Gold Ore?
In which biome is Gold Ore most abundant?
What happens to Piglins when you mine Gold Ore near them?

recipes.output: Raw Copper (2-5, up to 20 with Fortune III)

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What Y-level range does Copper Ore generate in?
With Fortune III, what is the maximum Raw Copper you can get from mining a single Copper Ore block?
What is the minimum tool to mine Copper Ore?

special.note: Drops Cobblestone unless mined with Silk Touch; can be generated by lava flowing over water

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: Is Stone a renewable resource?
trivia_hooks.answer: Yes - can be generated with lava flowing over water

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What does Stone drop when mined without Silk Touch?
What is the most common use for Stone blocks?
trivia_hooks.answer: Crafting Stone Bricks or creating Smooth Stone for building

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: How many Oak Wood blocks do you get from crafting 4 Oak Logs?
Can Wood blocks catch fire from lava?
How many different wood types are there in Minecraft?
trivia_hooks.answer: 11 types (Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Mangrove, Cherry, Pale Oak, Crimson, Warped)

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: In which biome do you find Dark Oak Trees?
What is the Resistance (blast resistance) of Dark Oak Wood?

special.note: Requires water contact to set from powder form

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: How many different color variants of Concrete exist?
What is required to convert Concrete Powder into solid Concrete?
What tool type is needed to mine Concrete?

recipes.output: Brick Stairs, Brick Slabs, Brick Walls

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: How many Brick items do you need to craft 1 Brick block?
How much blast resistance does a Brick block have?

special.note: Emits brightest possible light level; blocks sunlight; players suffocate inside; drops 2-4 Glowstone Dust when broken

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What is the light level emitted by Glowstone?
Where do you find Glowstone naturally?
What do you get when you break Glowstone?

special.note: Animated pulsing texture; emits brightest light level; transparent to light

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What special property does Sea Lantern have that Glowstone doesn't?
trivia_hooks.answer: Animated/pulsing texture; counts for Conduit activation

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What is the exact recipe for Sea Lantern?
trivia_hooks.answer: 2 Prismarine Shards + 4 Prismarine Crystals in an alternating pattern

recipes.input: Mobs die within 8 blocks of Sculk Catalyst

special.note: Spreads when mobs die near Sculk Catalyst; drops 1 XP when mined without Silk Touch

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What biome is associated with Sculk blocks?
What mechanism causes Sculk to spread?
trivia_hooks.answer: Mobs dying within 8 blocks of a Sculk Catalyst

special.note: Removed if attachment block moves or water/lava flows; signal decays with distance

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: How many Redstone Dust do you get from 1 Block of Redstone?
What is the maximum distance Redstone Dust can transmit a signal?
What happens to Redstone Dust if the block it's placed on is removed?

recipes.input: 3 Planks (top) + 4 Cobblestone (sides) + 1 Iron Ingot (center) + 1 Redstone Dust (bottom)

special.note: Pushes up to 12 adjacent blocks when powered by redstone signal; Sticky Piston version pulls 1 block

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: How many blocks can a Piston push when powered?
What is the key difference between a regular Piston and a Sticky Piston?
trivia_hooks.answer: Sticky Piston pulls blocks when retracting; regular Piston only pushes

special.note: Collects items from above; transfers items to/from containers; 5-item capacity

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What two main materials are needed to craft a Hopper?
How many items can a Hopper hold at once?

special.note: Emits quick redstone pulse (2-game-tick) from back when front block changes state

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What does an Observer detect and respond to?
trivia_hooks.answer: Changes in state of the block in front of it

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What exotic material is needed to craft an Observer?

special.note: Compares or subtracts redstone signals; useful for measuring container fullness

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What two modes does a Redstone Comparator have?
trivia_hooks.answer: Comparison mode (outputs if input â‰¥ side input) and Subtraction mode (outputs difference)

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What practical application can a Redstone Comparator have?
trivia_hooks.answer: Measuring how full a container is without directly detecting items

recipes.output: Grass Block (or Dirt without Silk Touch)

special.note: Spreads to nearby Dirt blocks; Passive mobs spawn preferentially on it; drops Dirt without Silk Touch

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What does Grass Block drop when mined without Silk Touch?
What special property does Grass Block have?
trivia_hooks.answer: It spreads to adjacent Dirt blocks under the right conditions

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: Where do passive mobs prefer to spawn?

special.note: Falls as entity when unsupported; used for Concrete Powder and Sandstone

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: Does Sand fall when unsupported?
trivia_hooks.answer: Yes - Sand is affected by gravity

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What do you get when you smelt Sand?
What is the orange variant of Sand called?

special.dropMechanic: 10% chance to drop Flint (varies with Fortune)
special.note: Falls as entity when unsupported; has 10% chance to drop Flint instead of Gravel block

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What is the special drop mechanic of Gravel?
trivia_hooks.answer: 10% chance to drop Flint instead of the block itself

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What happens to Gravel and Sand when unsupported?
trivia_hooks.answer: They fall as entities affected by gravity

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What materials do you need to make Concrete Powder?
trivia_hooks.answer: Sand + Gravel + Dye (in a specific pattern)

special.note: Extremely blast-resistant; only destructible by Wither's blue skulls; cannot be pushed by pistons

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: Which pickaxe tier can mine Obsidian?
What is the blast resistance value of Obsidian?
Why is Obsidian so hard to break?
trivia_hooks.answer: It has a hardness of 50 - the highest of any standard block

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What is the only way to destroy Obsidian in survival mode?
trivia_hooks.answer: Wither's blue skull attacks (or normal mining with Netherite pickaxe over time)

special.meltsBehavior: Melts into water when exposed to light level >11 (not in Nether)
special.note: Creates slippery surface; players/mobs slide on it; melts near light sources

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What special movement property does Ice have?
trivia_hooks.answer: It's slippery - players slide on it

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: What causes Ice to melt?
trivia_hooks.answer: Being exposed to a light level higher than 11 (doesn't melt in Nether)

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: Is Ice transparent?
What are the different types of ice blocks?
trivia_hooks.answer: Ice, Packed Ice, Blue Ice, and Frosted Ice

special.note: Resonates with adjacent Sculk Sensors, re-emitting vibrations; decorative/functional

trivia_hooks.questionSeed: Where do Amethyst Blocks generate?
How many Amethyst Shards are needed to craft an Amethyst Block?
What redstone component interacts with Amethyst Blocks?
trivia_hooks.answer: Sculk Sensors - Amethyst blocks resonate and re-emit vibrations

usage_guide.purpose: This corpus provides structured data for creating Minecraft block trivia questions
usage_guide.structure: Each block entry contains comprehensive property data and trivia hooks
how_to_use: Extract block properties for difficulty-adjusted questions
Use trivia_hooks as seeds for multiple-choice question generation
Compare properties across blocks for comparison-based questions
Leverage variants and crafting for deeper questions
Use texture URLs to display block images in your trivia game
usage_guide.scaling: This 25-block pilot can be expanded to all ~300 Minecraft blocks using the same methodology and JSON structure
usage_guide.data_quality_notes: All data extracted directly from minecraft.wiki; properties verified across wiki pages
